name: Snapchat
description: Snapchat is a multimedia messaging app for sending ephemeral photos, videos and stories enriched with camera filters and lenses.

years.notes: Original 'Ghostface Chillah' mark designed by Evan Spiegel in 2011 (Picaboo era). The ghost silhouette carries two black eyes and a tongue sticking out — face features removed in the 2013 rebrand. Face geometry approximated from historical references; the silhouette path matches the canonical 2013 outline used since.

2013 rebrand removed the face — clean white ghost silhouette on Snapchat yellow (#FFFC00) rounded square. Still the canonical app icon today; only the corner radius of the container has been refined over subsequent iOS/Android updates.
